$comment: Cranfield golden query set for Covalence search quality evaluation. Each entry defines a representative query, the recommended search mode/strategy, a human description of what is being tested, and a minimum score threshold a hit must meet to be counted as a successful retrieval. Without a fixed corpus, relevance judgments cannot be pre-assigned — see README.md for Phase 2 plans.

queries.query: how does confidence scoring work
queries.description: Baseline vector retrieval — tests that the engine can surface articles about the epistemic confidence model from a natural-language prose question.

queries.query: provenance tracking article sources
queries.description: Lexical-heavy precise strategy — verifies that exact domain terms ('provenance', 'article', 'sources') score highly when the lexical dimension is weighted up.

queries.query: contention detection and resolution supersede contradicts
queries.description: Multi-term keyword query covering the contention lifecycle — tests lexical recall for low-frequency technical vocabulary.

queries.query: graph traversal neighborhood edges hops
queries.description: Graph-heavy strategy — verifies that the graph dimension contributes meaningfully when querying about relational structure.

queries.query: pgvector HNSW halfvec embeddings semantic search
queries.description: Technical terminology query — tests that rare implementation-specific terms ('halfvec', 'HNSW') are recoverable via lexical matching.

queries.query: what happens when a source contradicts an existing article
queries.description: Causal/process question — tests vector similarity for conceptual understanding queries that don't use exact field names.

queries.query: slow path queue compile embed split merge
queries.description: Multi-token operational query — verifies the engine surfaces queue-related content using balanced fusion of vector and lexical signals.

queries.query: recency bias freshness weight scoring
queries.description: Temporal intent query — tests that temporal scoring metadata (freshness, recency_bias) surfaces content describing time-weighted retrieval.

queries.query: compile sources into article LLM summarization
queries.description: Hierarchical mode — validates that article-first retrieval with source expansion works for queries about the compilation pipeline.

queries.query: Rust actix-web async tokio runtime
queries.description: Implementation-technology query — tests recall of content about the engine's Rust/async stack using lexical-heavy matching.

queries.query: organic eviction capacity management forgetting
queries.description: Bounded-memory lifecycle query — verifies that eviction and capacity management concepts are findable.

queries.query: search ranking formula relevance confidence freshness
queries.description: Exploratory query about the composite scoring formula — tests vector retrieval for conceptual documentation.

queries.query: node lifecycle active superseded archived tombstone
queries.description: State machine / lifecycle query — lexical match on enum-like terms; tests that domain-specific vocabulary is indexed and retrievable.

queries.query: Apache AGE graph database PostgreSQL
queries.description: Named-entity query — tests entity-intent routing and graph-strategy weighting for a specific technology name.

queries.query: domain path filter hierarchical tags classification
queries.description: Structural/metadata query — verifies that content about domain_path filtering is surfaced.

queries.query: session ingestion auto-recall auto-capture OpenClaw plugin
queries.description: Plugin/integration query — tests that documentation about the OpenClaw integration is retrievable.

queries.query: vector lexical graph structural dimension weights fusion RRF
queries.description: Comprehensive multi-dimension query — tests that core hybrid search architecture documentation scores well across all four search dimensions.

queries.query: knowledge base health stats queue depth capacity
queries.description: Admin/observability query — verifies that health and statistics endpoints documentation is surfaced.

queries.query: tree index hierarchical parent child structure
queries.description: Graph + hierarchical mode combination — tests that graph traversal and hierarchical article expansion work together for structural queries.

queries.query: OpenAI embeddings text-embedding-3-small OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
queries.description: Configuration/environment variable lookup — tests precise lexical recall for exact configuration key names that a user might search for.
